cards.back: A two-dimensional representation of colors, with red, green, and blue as primary colors
A color model that uses red, green, and blue light to create a wide range of colors
A type of image blur caused by noise in an image, often removed using smoothing techniques
A technique used to sharpen images by selectively amplifying differences between neighboring pixels
A type of image filter that replaces each pixel with the median value of neighboring pixels, effective in reducing noise
